faq.question: Which cities does Deluxe Windows serve in San Mateo County?
faq.answer: Deluxe Windows serves window and door replacement projects across San Mateo County. Confirm the property address when requesting an estimate so travel, permitting, and installation details can be checked.

faq.question: Do replacement windows require permits in San Mateo County?
faq.answer: Permit requirements in San Mateo County are set by the city or local building authority and can vary by project scope, property type, and historic status. Requirements are reviewed for the specific address.

faq.question: Which window features matter for homes in San Mateo County?
faq.answer: For homes in San Mateo County, compare solar control, insulation, air leakage, frame durability, ventilation, and exposure. The right balance depends on the property's microclimate and orientation.

faq.question: How do I request a window replacement estimate in San Mateo County?
faq.answer: Provide the San Mateo County property address, approximate window count, preferred materials, and any known access or HOA requirements. Deluxe Windows can then schedule measurements and prepare project-specific options.
